goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 12:45' and should go to 'birmingham new street'.
The train should leave on 'saturday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'lovell lodge'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 12:45 and should go to birmingham new street
The train should leave on saturday and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get travel time
You are also looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called lovell lodge
Make sure you get phone number
